rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 132px; height: 120px; padding-top: 20px; margin-left: 20px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; width: 130px; height: 120px; overflow: hidden; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; width: 100%; height: 100%; white-space: nowrap;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 187), rgb(42, 31, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 165px; height: 1px; padding-top: 59px; margin-left: 163px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #666600;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#666600, #a2a24a); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
